summary: OCB TITAN AI modules testing completed successfully. All 5 new modules (Global Map, AI Command Center, KPI & Performance, CRM AI, Data Export) are fully functional with backend APIs returning correct data and frontend pages loading properly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: OCB TITAN AI modules all working. Frontend pages tested: Global Map (with Leaflet map), AI Command Center (with insights/recommendations), KPI Performance (with ranking system), CRM AI (with prompt builder), Data Export (with JSON/CSV export).
